common.condition_behavior_description: How the state should match on the targeted motion sensors.
common.trigger_behavior_description: The behavior of the targeted motion sensors to trigger on.

is_detected.description: Tests if one or more motion sensors are detecting motion.
is_detected.name: Motion is detected

is_not_detected.description: Tests if one or more motion sensors are not detecting motion.
is_not_detected.name: Motion is not detected

cleared.description: Triggers after one or more motion sensors stop detecting motion.
cleared.name: Motion cleared

detected.description: Triggers after one or more motion sensors start detecting motion.
detected.name: Motion detected
